payload.description: Switch Installations near Jamaica in support of the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project.
Trackwork programs will support Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.

The committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.

tool_args.label: East Side Access Support Projects Update - November 2022

payload.description: The Committee will be briefed on the status of the East Side Access Support Projects.

The Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations near Jamaica in support of the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project. Additionally, trackwork programs will support Switch Maintenance near Valley Stream, and Rail Maintenance on the Wreck Lead Bridge in Island Park.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2023.

The Agency will present its revised 2023 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2022 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2022 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2022 Adopted Budget.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2022 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.
The committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.

This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2024 Budget.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2023 Budget.

payload.claim_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Safety Report

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: Police Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Operations Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues against prior year results.
payload.subject: Ridership Report
